info.description:
REST Services for managing the Bookmark modeler (dsbks).  
Bookmark Folder refers to either Bookmark Root Folder or Bookmark Folder.
info.title: Bookmark Web Services

post.summary: Detaches the list of items in the given Bookmark Folder.
post.description: Detaches multiple external items from a given Bookmark Folder and returns the Bookmark Folder or failure message in case of error. Maximum 50 items are allowed in a service call.

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Role.Organization.CollabSpace value Ex:VPLMProjectLeader.MyCompany.Default

parameters.name: ENO_CSRF_TOKEN
parameters.description: csrf token. You can get it from 3DSpace/resources/v1/application/CSRF

parameters.name: ID
parameters.description: dsbks:Bookmark object ID

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. For dsbks:BksMask.Items, dsbks:BksMask.Items2 and dsbks:BksMask.Bookmarks the maximum items returned is 25. Use $top/$skip to fetch additional items.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned under the Bookmark Folder, accepts a maximum value of 50 (to be used along with $mask query parameter having values dsbks:BksMask.Items, dsbks:BksMask.Items2 and dsbks:BksMask.Bookmarks)

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

403.description: FORBIDDEN. The server understood the request, but is refusing to fulfill it. Authorization will not help and the request SHOULD NOT be repeated. If the request method was not HEAD and the server wishes to make public why the request has not been fulfilled, it SHOULD describe the reason for the refusal in the entity. If the server does not wish to make this information available to the client, the status code 404 (Not Found) can be used instead.

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

get.summary: Gets a indexed search result of Bookmark Folder
get.description: Gets a indexed search result of Bookmark Folder object referencing items

parameters.name: SecurityContext
parameters.description: Role.Organization.CollabSpace value Ex:VPLMProjectLeader.MyCompany.Default

parameters.name: $searchStr
parameters.description: A search text to find one or more items.

parameters.name: $mask
parameters.description: Mask defining what will be returned. Default Mask is:dsbks:BksMask.Common

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Represents the total number of items returned from the search, accepts a maximum value of 1000.

parameters.name: $skip
parameters.description: Represents the number of items to skip (to be used along with $top query parameter)

400.description: BAD REQUEST. The request could not be understood by the server due to malformed syntax. The client SHOULD NOT repeat the request without modifications.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED. The request requires user authentication. The response MUST include a WWW-Authenticate header field containing a challenge applicable to the requested resource. The client MAY repeat the request with a suitable Authorization header field. If the request already included Authorization credentials, then the 401 response indicates that authorization has been refused for those credentials. If the 401 response contains the same challenge as the prior response, and the user agent has already attempted authentication at least once, then the user SHOULD be presented the entity that was given in the response, since that entity might include relevant diagnostic information. HTTP access authentication is explained in "HTTP Authentication: Basic and Digest Access Authentication".

500.description: INTERNAL SERVER ERROR. A generic error message, given when an unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable.

parentId.description: Parent Id of Bookmark Folder ( optional )

title.description: Title of Bookmark Folder to create

description.description: Description of Bookmark Folder to create

items.description: Get the list of items linked to the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.
Get the list of items linked to the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.

bookmarks.description: Get the list of bookmarks linked to the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.
Get the list of bookmarks linked to the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.

parent.description: Get the parent Bookmark Folder of the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated).
Get the parent Bookmark Folder of the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated).

items.description: Get the list of items linked to the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.

items2.description: Get the list of items linked and links on the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.

bookmarks.description: Get the list of bookmarks linked to the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated). $top and $skip can be used as query parameters for pagination.

parent.description: Get the parent Bookmark Folder of the Bookmark Folder from the index (the object existence might be outdated).

id.description: id of item for which locate is called

errorCode.description: An integer representing an error code mapped to a specific error message, which is returned for same HTTP status code

failedObjects.description: List of content objects which caused the entire request failure

message.example: The following Bookmarks could not be deleted.  Possible reasons are access or maturity state prohibits delete of an object in the structure. Bookmark Folder Bookmark_Name 1
You are unable to change the content of this Bookmark Folder due to its maturity state.  Please demote to a state which allows change of content.
Some objects don't exist (or) user has no access to them.
The ENO_CSRF_TOKEN header is missing, invalid or has expired
You are unable to change the structure of this Bookmark Folder due to its maturity state.  Please demote to a state which allows change of structure.
Internal Error. Please, contact your administrator.

Example_Detach_Content.summary: Example payload for detaching a content

Example_Detach_Link.summary: Example payload for detaching a link

Example_Detach_Content_Link.summary: Example payload for detaching both content and link

Example_Detach_Content_Old.summary: Example payload for detaching a content (old payload)

Example_Attach_Content.summary: Example payload for attaching a content

Example_Attach_Link.summary: Example payload for attaching a link

Example_Attach_Content_Link.summary: Example payload for attaching both content and link

Example_Attach_Content_Old.summary: Example payload for attaching a content (old payload)

Example_Response_Commons_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Common or no mask is specified

Example_Response_Details_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Details mask is specified

Example_Response_Items_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Items mask is specified

Example_Response_Items2_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Items2 mask is specified

Example_Response_Bookmarks_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Bookmarks mask is specified

Example_Response_Parent_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Parent mask is specified

Example_Response_CustomerAttributes_Fiel.summary: Example response when dsmveno:CustomerAttributes field is specified

Example_Response_BULKUPDATE_Commons_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Common or no mask is specified

Example_Response_BULKUPDATE_Details_Mask.summary: Example response when dsbks:BksMask.Details mask is specified

Example_Response_BULKUPDATE_CustomerAttr.summary: Example response when dsmveno:CustomerAttributes field is specified

Example_Already_Attached.summary: Example response for already attached content

value.message: Objects already connected

Example_Attach_To_Bookmark_In_Maturity.summary: Example attach response when bookmark folder is in maturity state

value.message: You are unable to change the content of this Bookmark Folder due to its maturity state.  Please demote to a state which allows change of content.

Example_No_Attach_Access_On_Bookmark.summary: Example response when user has no attach access on bookmark folder

value.message: You do not have the required responsibility in the target collaborative space to attach an object to this Bookmark Folder.

Example_No_Attach_Access_On_Content.summary: Example response when user has no attach access on content

value.message: You do not have the required responsibility in the target collaborative space to attach this object to a Bookmark Folder.

Example_Attach_Inaccessible_Id.summary: Example response when user passed inaccessible id of content

value.message: Some objects don't exist (or) user has no access to them.

Example_Attach_Unsupported_Object.summary: Example response for attaching unsupported content

value.message: This type of object is not supported.

Example_Attach_Non_public_Object.summary: Example response for attaching non-public content

value.message: Only public objects can be used for authoring operations.

Example_Attach_To_Legacy_Bookmark.summary: Example response for attaching content to a legacy bookmark folder

value.message: The authoring operations on legacy Bookmark Folders is not authorized.

Example_Attach_More_Than_Maximum_Content.summary: Example response for attaching more than maximum allowed content objects

value.message: Maximum 50 objects are only allowed.

Example_Already_Attached_Link.summary: Example response for already attached link

value.message: You cannot create this reference as the uri it contains already exists in target Bookmark Folder.

Example_Attach_Invalid_Link.summary: Example response for attaching link with invalid external URL

value.message: Invalid pattern specified for Link. Check documentation for valid patterns.

Example_No_Attach_Link_Access_On_Bookmar.summary: Example response when user has no attach link access on bookmark folder

value.message: You do not have necessary access to add, remove or modify links of this Bookmark Folder.

Example_Attach_Missing_Item.summary: Example response when items is missing from payload

value.message: Input parameter 'items' is missing.

Example_Attach_Missing_Referenced_Type.summary: Example response when referencedType is missing from payload

value.message: Input parameter 'referencedType' is missing.

Example_Attach_Invalid_Referenced_Type.summary: Example response when invalid referencedType is passed in payload

value.message: Invalid value of referencedType is passed.

Example_Attach_Missing_External_URL.summary: Example response when externalUrl is missing from payload

value.message: Input parameter 'externalUrl' is missing.

Example_Attach_Missing_Title.summary: Example response when title is missing from payload

value.message: Input parameter 'title' is missing.

Example_Attach_NO_CSRF.summary: Example response when CSRF token is not specified

value.message: The ENO_CSRF_TOKEN header is missing, invalid or has expired

Example_Invalid_Payload.summary: Example response when payload is invalid

value.message: Payload is not valid.

Example_Attach_Empty_Items.summary: Example response when items is empty in the payload

value.message: Input parameter 'items' cannot be empty.

Example_Attach_Invalid_Item_Type.summary: Example response when invalid type of items is passed in payload

value.message: Input parameter 'items' must be an object.

Example_Attach_Invalid_Referenced_Object.summary: Example response when invalid type of referencedObject is passed in payload

value.message: Input parameter 'referencedObject' must be an object.
Cannot authenticate the context.

Example_Internal_Server_Error.summary: Example response for internal server error

value.message: Internal Error. Please, contact your administrator.
